root.sql:
SELECT vr_nsk_015_001000.confirm_date, vr_nsk_015_001000.membership_no, vr_nsk_015_001000.prename, vr_nsk_015_001000.member_name, vr_nsk_015_001000.member_surname, vr_nsk_015_001000.sex, vr_nsk_015_001000.mem_type_desc, vr_nsk_015_001000.mem_address, vr_nsk_015_001000.district_name, vr_nsk_015_001000.province_name, vr_nsk_015_001000.postcode, vr_nsk_015_001000.telephone, vr_nsk_015_001000.date_of_birth, vr_nsk_015_001000.approve_date, vr_nsk_015_001000.approve_id, vr_nsk_015_001000.id_card, vr_nsk_015_001000.apply_date, vr_nsk_015_001000.member_status_name, vr_nsk_015_001000.data_monthly, vr_nsk_015_001000.data_balance, vr_nsk_015_001000.salary_amount , vr_nsk_015_001000.member_group_no FROM vr_nsk_015_001000 ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where 1=1 and vr_nsk_015_001000.confirm_date = '!confirm_date_1!' and vr_nsk_015_001000.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and vr_nsk_015_001000.membership_no= sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
/*WHERE*/
